prediction.reasoning: The point estimate for a 3-day horizon is set to the current price ($104.41), reflecting the inherent unpredictability of short-term stock movements without specific market catalysts. The confidence intervals are calculated using an assumed daily historical volatility (standard deviation of daily returns) of 1.5%, scaled for a 3-day period by the square root of time. This method accounts for the expected range of price fluctuations based on past market behavior. Actual prices may fall outside these intervals.
